column1: Fri, 18 Jan 2002 08:13:27 -0800 (PST),"Apollo, Beth","McLoughlin, Hector",FW: Pam Carter,"I've already forwarded for approval so that we can act as needed.   Once I have prelim. approval I'll forward it to you for further consideration.

Many of them will be in the ongoing company.
Who's approval do I need to get this done?
here is a list of things Pam would be able to do if we could bring her back.  A number (Almost all) of these items are not being done.
